## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Intoxalock and Growth Act Labs (Marcel Santilli) for organic content creation and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth Act Labs has achieved impressive organic traffic growth for clients like DeepGram and Homebase through their content operations approach](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Their process involves building custom AI-assisted workflows, training human reviewers, and managing the full content lifecycle from ideation to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Compliance and accuracy are top priorities, with capabilities to integrate data sources, fact-check, and implement custom review processes](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Next step is for Intoxalock team to discuss internally and potentially schedule a kickoff if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background & Growth Act Labs

  - [Extensive experience building content operations and contributor networks at IBM, HP, startups](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Founded Growth Act Labs to help companies become "media companies" through AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Approach combines strategy (keyword research, content planning) and execution (AI writing, human review, publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Has achieved strong results for clients like DeepGram (30x traffic growth), Homebase, Steadily (insurance)](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Content Operations Process

  - [Build custom AI writing workflows adapted to client's use case and quality bar](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Train dedicated team of writers/editors to operate the workflows](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Manage full lifecycle from keyword research to final QA before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Leverage automation, AI tools (e.g. fact-checking), and human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Publish high volumes (10-15 pieces/week or more for programmatic use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Compliance & Accuracy

  - [Can implement any custom processes needed for legal/regulatory reviews](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Integrate with client data sources to trigger content updates when rules change](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Use approved sources, citations, human fact-checking as needed](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Maintain content database to enable tagging, monitoring, updating published content](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Onboarding & Client Time Commitment

  - [1-2 week intensive kickoff to gather requirements and calibrate quality](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Then weekly syncs, with most communication asynchronous (Slack, Notion, Loom)](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Typically 1-3 main client contacts involved ongoing (content, growth, marketing leads)](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to share additional info and examples](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [Intoxalock team to discuss internally after upcoming offsite](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Potential kickoff meeting scheduled for next Wednesday 9am PT](https://fathom.video/share/VmXTeWn3V-snqG-kHFfPcUiws9Q9TzBq?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
